services.sub: From strategic planning to execution, we bring pixel-precise execution to create maximum impact for your brand.

items.title: Brand Strategy
items.desc: From brand positioning and visual identity to brand voice, we build a consistent, powerful brand image that helps you stand out in a competitive market.

items.title: Social Media Marketing
items.desc: Integrating Instagram, Facebook, and Threads with creative content and precise audience targeting to rapidly grow your brand's reach and engagement.

items.title: Digital Ad Placement
items.desc: Precision targeting on Google Ads and Meta Ads, paired with A/B testing and data optimization to maximize your return on ad spend.

items.title: Content Production
items.desc: A one-stop service for video production, copywriting, and visual design — building brand authority with high-quality original content that drives organic traffic.

items.title: E-commerce Growth Hacking
items.desc: Optimizing the shopping journey and conversion rates for e-commerce brands, connecting the full sales funnel from SEO to remarketing and email automation.

items.title: Data Analytics & Insights
items.desc: Building a comprehensive data tracking framework with clear marketing dashboards and periodic reports, so every decision is backed by data.

about.sub: Pixelholic (registered as 玖漾國際行銷有限公司) is a brand consultancy focused on integrated digital marketing, helping brands stand out in the digital age with precise strategy and bold creativity.
about.intro1: Guided by our core belief of "Pixel-Driven, Brand Evolution," we've worked across industries from tech (KingCart EV accessories, Polaris eSIM) to food and handmade crafts (Woolbuddy, now selling worldwide).
about.intro2: We're more than just an ad agency — we're your long-term growth partner. On every project, we show up like founders, treating your brand as if it were our own.

values.title: Pixel Precision
values.desc: Every detail is as precise as a pixel — we accept no deviation in execution.

values.title: Bold Creativity
values.desc: Breaking conventional frameworks with unconventional creative thinking to create real brand differentiation.

values.title: Data-Driven
values.desc: Every decision is grounded in data, so every marketing dollar delivers maximum impact.

values.title: Constant Evolution
values.desc: Staying ahead of digital trends, continuously updating our knowledge and tools to keep strategy on the cutting edge.

process.title: Brand Diagnosis
process.desc: A deep dive into your brand's current state, target audience, and competitive landscape.

process.title: Strategic Planning
process.desc: Crafting a tailored digital marketing strategy and execution roadmap.

process.title: Creative Execution
process.desc: Bringing precise creative content to life across every channel.

process.title: Data Optimization
process.desc: Continuously tracking performance and iterating to maximize ROI.

kingcart.name: KingCart
kingcart.tagline: The go-to accessory partner for Tesla owners
kingcart.description: KingCart is Taiwan's leading Tesla accessories brand, specializing in premium accessories for the Model 3, Y, S, and X — from center console organizers to carbon fiber badges and cabin upgrades. The brand operates four showrooms across Taiwan: Taipei Neihu, Taichung Nantun, Miaoli Zhunan, and Tainan.
kingcart.challenge: Taiwan's EV market is growing fast, but Tesla owners had low brand awareness of accessory options, and competitors were mostly low-cost Chinese brands. KingCart needed to build brand recognition and a premium perception.
kingcart.solution: Centered on a "premium Tesla lifestyle" narrative, we produced high-quality unboxing videos and owner lifestyle content, paired with precisely targeted Meta Ads reaching Tesla owners, plus KOL partnerships to reach new owners.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic helped us shift from “selling accessories” to “selling a lifestyle.” Our brand premium grew significantly, and average order value increased by 40%.
testimonial.author: KingCart Founder

polaris.name: Polaris eSIM
polaris.description: Polaris eSIM is a Taiwan-native travel eSIM brand and the first to introduce full "route transparency" — letting travelers see exactly which carrier route each plan uses before they buy. Coverage spans 200+ countries and regions, with native direct routes in 10+ popular destinations. Polaris has been featured in Commercial Times, Economic Daily News, and TechNews.
polaris.challenge: The eSIM market is fiercely competitive, and consumers struggle to tell quality apart — while "routed" connections were hurting the travel experience. Polaris needed a differentiated position to break through.
polaris.solution: We made "route transparency" the core brand promise, building authority through in-depth tech media PR, paired with SEO content strategy and precise Google Ads targeting to capture mindshare ahead of peak travel seasons.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic turned our technical edge into language consumers actually understand — making “route transparency” an industry talking point that drove significant organic traffic.
testimonial.author: Polaris eSIM Marketing Director

cmei.name: CMEI Select
cmei.tagline: Taiwan-select ingredients, fresh to your door
cmei.description: CMEI Select is built around carefully sourced Taiwanese ingredients, best known for its thick-cut juicy pork jerky strips (honey, garlic, Sichuan spicy, Thai lime, and more — 9 flavors), alongside imported snacks, juices, and lifestyle goods from Japan, Korea, New Zealand and Australia. Products are sold on major channels including PX Mart, PChome, momo, Shopee, and Eastern Home Shopping.
cmei.challenge: Taiwan's food e-commerce market is intensely competitive, with low brand awareness, limited platform visibility, and a hard time building loyalty for a new brand.
cmei.solution: Centered on "genuine Taiwan-select ingredients," we produced ingredient-sourcing videos and taste-test unboxing content, paired with cross-platform joint promotions and limited-flavor flash sales to build buzz and drive cross-platform sales.

testimonial.quote: From unknown to Top 5 in momo's jerky category — Pixelholic's e-commerce strategy helped us achieve in one year what usually takes three.
testimonial.author: CMEI Select CEO

yunyang.name: Yunyang International Travel
yunyang.tagline: 30 years of expertise, flying you to your dream destination
yunyang.description: Founded in 1992, Yunyang International Travel has served the Tainan and Chiayi travel market for over 30 years as a licensed Category-A travel agency. Since 2005 it has been the exclusive Vietnam Airlines agent for the greater Tainan region, winning the region's top sales award year after year — including the Vietnam Airlines Platinum Sales Award in 2024. It also operates a Taiwan Compatriot Permit and passport processing center serving over 100 partner agencies across the Yunlin-Chiayi-Tainan region.
yunyang.challenge: A traditional travel agency with 30+ years of history faced digital transformation pressure: its existing customer base skewed older with low awareness among younger travelers, and limited online visibility made it hard to stand out on search and social.
yunyang.solution: Centered on "30 years of trust, the top choice for Vietnam travel," we comprehensively optimized the website's SEO and Google Ads strategy, built a Vietnam travel content matrix on Instagram and Facebook to precisely reach travelers aged 25–45, and strengthened Google review management.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic helped us make a smooth digital transition, bringing 30 years of word-of-mouth reputation online. Vietnam tour bookings grew significantly, and even younger customers started finding us.
testimonial.author: Yunyang International Travel General Manager

woolbuddy.name: Woolbuddy
woolbuddy.tagline: Bring Creativity to Life with Wool
woolbuddy.description: Woolbuddy is a needle-felting brand founded by Jackie Huang, a former 3D artist at Lucasfilm, offering premium felting kits, wool roving, and felting mats. Designed around a zero-waste, eco-friendly philosophy, the brand is beloved by crafters worldwide, repeatedly ranked as a bestseller in Amazon's handicrafts category, and sold across multiple global markets.
woolbuddy.challenge: Woolbuddy already had solid overseas recognition, but low visibility in the Taiwan market, and the handicrafts audience is fragmented and hard to reach at scale.
woolbuddy.solution: Centered on the founder's story (a former Lucasfilm artist), we produced a series of Mandarin needle-felting tutorial videos, paired with IG Reels and YouTube Shorts to reach the crafting community, while optimizing Amazon product pages to boost conversion.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic helped our brand story resonate in Taiwan — the crafting community's engagement exceeded expectations and drove steady long-tail sales.
testimonial.author: Woolbuddy Founder, Jackie
